description: Payload templates for campaign email sends via Zapier

email_1_direct.subject: Quick tax/bookkeeping check for 2026
email_1_direct.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I help high-income earners and business owners reduce tax drag and tighten bookkeeping so decisions are cleaner year-round.

If you’re at $100k+ income, there are usually a few strategy levers worth reviewing before year-end.

Open to a quick 30-min strategy call?
https://calendly.com/cromine-rhw/30-min-zoom

– Chea Romine, CPA / Managing Partner
cromine@rhwcpas.com

email_2_value.subject: 3 common misses I see at $100k+ income
email_2_value.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Three common gaps I see:
1) Income structure not optimized
2) Deductions not planned early enough
3) Bookkeeping too delayed to be useful

If helpful, I can walk through your setup and show where savings/opportunities may exist.
https://calendly.com/cromine-rhw/30-min-zoom

– Chea

email_3_social_proof.subject: Similar clients usually find 1–3 immediate improvements
email_3_social_proof.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Most clients in your range find immediate improvements once we review structure + books together.

If you want, we can do a focused 30-min review and I’ll give clear next steps.
https://calendly.com/cromine-rhw/30-min-zoom

– Chea

email_4_breakup.subject: Close the loop?
email_4_breakup.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Should I close this out, or do you want a quick strategy session on tax + bookkeeping optimization?

If yes, book here: https://calendly.com/cromine-rhw/30-min-zoom

– Chea

curlExample: curl -X POST 'https://hooks.zapier.com/hooks/catch/26534236/ucgsjhs/' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"to":"lead@example.com","subject":"Quick tax/bookkeeping check for 2026","body":"Hi John..."}'
